content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1573: Create a Miracle! Translator: Sigma_ Editor: SSins

Time and Space seemed to have paused at this moment.

An entire space in amber color was frozen and silenced. Tens of thousands of experts of the four clans were fixed. Their souls and body were nailed. It seemed like there was no power in this world that could rescue them.

The terrifying race war that should be so furious stopped strangely. The confrontation between the Ten Great Territory Ancestors ceased quietly.

At this moment, everyone gazed at that area, Shi Yan, and Montecie.

A fierce fear filled Dragon Lizard and the others’ hearts, expanding to their bodies. They felt lucky that they had escaped one step earlier.

So many living warriors were like dragons or tigers a moment ago. Just in seconds, they became like fossils.

That area was like earth and heaven prison that had locked everything including creatures, bones, pieces of flesh, and fragments and put them into eternal silence. They were all frozen and couldn’t move even a bit.

Including Beverly at Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm! “What happened? How could it be?” Looking at tens of thousands of frozen warriors, Hiro was bewildered. He sensed and changed his face in fear. “It’s a powerful sealing technique. My Soul Consciousness couldn’t seep into it! Gosh!”

“Time and Space have cast an eternal seal. The power at that level isn’t something that we can understand.” Dracula’s eyes were glistening. His white bone body wiggled and crackled as if he wanted to do that to prove he was still able to move.

Tian Xie and the experts of the God Clan, Judy and Han Tian of the Mysterious Sky Clan were bewildered and skeptical.

They knew that they are lucky...

When Shi Yan’s Soul Consciousness came, they could feel his tense and uneasy feeling. They decided to trust him and ask their fellows to leave at the fastest speed.

They didn’t mind if their bodies got hurt.

What happened had proven their decision and their belief in Shi Yan. Most warriors of the Mysterious Sky Clan, White Bone clan, and Tian Xie’s team had escaped. However, several thousand hesitant warriors were frozen together with the Devouring Clan.

Briefly, they had to bear a small loss that they could accept.

Serene Prison, Rupert, and Edgar couldn’t accept this. Many experts in their forces were sealed. How could they continue this war?

They couldn’t believe their eyes when they saw Beverly there. At Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, she couldn’t escape. How could that happen?

After dozens of seconds of silence, Edgar and Serene Prison showed resolute faces. Leaving Han Tian and the others, they headed towards that sealed space.

“Break!”

Edgar condensed his blood to create a massive bloody sword that carried his desperate and destructive will. That blood sword was ten thousand meters long like a silver river, slashing on that area.

Boom!

The blood sword that could halve an entire planet gashed that amber area and clashed like a loud explosion.

The bloody sword broke into pieces!

Lights in Edgar’s eyes dimmed. He couldn’t help but spurt blood. However, he restrained himself and tried not to vomit blood.

Serene Prison’s face changed fast. Deep fear occupied his heart. He hesitated for a while before opening his mouth to release countless souls and ghosts. The ghosts weaved with each other into a thick mesh net and covered the amber space. He urged his energy to shake that space.

“Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!”

So many wailing and screeching ghosts hovered in this piece of the universe. Serene Prison’s God power rolled like a river and poured into his ghosts.

However, he couldn’t sway that space or pull his fellows out of the amber trap.

Seeing Edgar and Serene Prison fail, Rupert didn’t try and just talked gloomily, “It seems like the three of us need to join hands...”

Serene Prison and Edgar were shaken as they thought that it was possible. They decided to join hands to try.

However, in this moment, two divine light columns shot out from that space. After they got out, they slowly turned into Shi Yan and Montecie.

They stood shoulder by shoulder, their faces complicated. They didn’t look at Serene Prison and Edgar but the solid, amber space. The strange light flared in their eyes and became more odd...

The solid, sealed space cast by their soul, power Upanishads, and God power could seal the entire world and imprison the experts forever. However, when they observed the space underneath, they had a strange feeling that they couldn’t explain. It felt like the world down there didn’t relate a bit to them.

Even if they wanted to get in there one more time, it seemed impossible.

Shi Yan pondered for a while and then turned into a space lightsaber. He wanted to get in there and rescue some members of the Mysterious Sky Clan and White Bone Clan.

Strange things happened. When he touched that space, it felt like a massive rubber ball. It bounced him back with a soft but powerful force.

He discolored in fear and turned to Montecie with a puzzled face.

Montecie also tried to use her Time energy to get in there. Similarly, she was sent back. She couldn’t intrude that amber space.

“What happened?” Judy quietly approached. She paused when she was dozens of meters away from the other two.

“We combined Time and Space power Upanishads to cast a seal. It works well, though. Anyway, its power was over our estimation. Even the two of us can’t get into that sealed area. It looks like space there was eternally sealed and no force can tear it.”

Montecie resumed her natural poise. Pondering, she said sadly, “This forbidden technique is too bizarre. I didn’t expect it to be so fierce like that. The warriors captured inside will exist like that forever. Unless some force breaks that space, they will never be able to get out...”

“No seal is unbreakable!”

However, Yuan Zu’s low-pitched shout arose above their heads.

Boom!

Their soul altars were shaken. Then, the black sea emerged right before the massive Absolute Beginning body of Yuan Zu descended. The giant turtle was much bigger than several life stars, forcefully barging into the amber space. He wanted to smash it.

His real body was the Absolute Beginning creature called Yuan, a formidable existence at Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. He had the highest realm in this vast sea of stars.

On earth and in heaven, in this dark, endless universe, and at the end of the mysterious abysses, only his peers like Devour, Desolate, and Zi Yao could compete against him. Except for those people, Sauron, the divine dragon whose tail they couldn’t see, could also deal with him. Those experts were the ones who had walked to the end of their cultivating path to reach Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm.

Even in the Absolute Beginning Era, they were at the high echelon and not many people could resist them.

With his real body and the seething black sea covering it, this impact was extremely tremendous; it shook the entire world as if it could break an entire natural territory!

All the experts in this area were horror-struck. Even Rupert, Serene Prison, and Montecie had to change their faces as they moved backward.

Only Shi Yan wore a cold face and snorted. He hid in a space crack and watched Yuan’s body bump into the space.

BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!

Yuan in his giant turtle body had condensed the weight of so many territories in the sea of stars to savagely attack that amber space. The shockwaves from that impact had pressed on many experts. Blood streamed down from their seven natural facial holes. Rupert even felt his muscles shiver.

The solid void caused by Time and Space power Upanishad, the amber, sealed space didn’t even have a scratch.

The warriors present here were all the strongest experts in this vast sea of stars. Whether they were from the same side or not, they were dumbstruck and their eyes were fixed on Shi Yan and Montecie.

Miracle! It was a miracle!

“Impossible! There’s no space that I can’t break! There’s no seal that I can’t tear!”

Yuan howled crazily like a beast at the last moment of its life. The giant turtle body shook hard and created waves of reaching energy, which discolored even the earth and heaven!

Pretty far from this area, because of his unceasing energy, many planets shattered and sank like tiny fireflies in the dark universe, disappearing to an unknown area. The territories under his seeping energy cracked and sent an apocalypse to the creatures living there.

“It’s impossible!”

He was still launching more attacks and using both his energy and physical strength of the giant body to barge and tear this heavenly seal.

Unfortunately, all of his deeds were gone in vain. The area where Shi Yan’s and Montecie’s soul, power Upanishads, and God power had soaked had become an everlasting miracle of this world. It looked like when it was created when there was nothing in this world that could break or unseal it.

“The absolute time and space seals in their finest stage can even confine the world or an entire era and freeze billions of lives like insects inside amber. They will stay like that forever and nothing can change it...”

Deep in the void where clouds hovered, Zi Yao sat on the snake head, observing and sighing, “In our Absolute Beginning Era, no creature could merge time and space closely and magically like that. I can’t believe people in this era could do it. It’s lucky that you guys haven’t reached Peak of Territory Ancestor Realm. Otherwise, not only this area but also the entire Sea Domain of Nihility would have froze like this!”

Hearing her, all the experts looked disbelieving. They didn’t know that when Time and Space powers were merged to the acme, they could seal the entire world!

“Yuan, you can’t tear that space. I can’t and neither can Desolate!” Zi Yao coldly looked at the giant turtle underneath and spoke indifferently, “Unless you can advance through the Territory Ancestor Realm to reach that level... Yeah, the Absolute Beginning Realm, you can use your thoughts to give birth to a whole new world. That’s when you can unseal the eternal Time and Space Seal.”

Her words silenced all the experts here. No one could retort. Yuan pulled himself together and mumbled, “It turns out that the rumor is correct...”
